title: Explain report evidence deterministically
description: Expose the exact formula, threshold, baseline, coverage, limitation, and producer provenance for every supported result or explicit state. Goal trace: G2 and G6.
rationale: A financial signal without inspectable evidence is not trustworthy enough to retain or deliver through another channel.
story_want: inspect why a metric, pace state, or unavailable state appears
story_so_that: I can reconcile and challenge the report without reverse-engineering it
acceptance_criteria: Given a supported exact metric, when its explanation is inspected, then exact value, window bounds, category or total identity, source evidence references, and arithmetic rule are returned.

Given a supported Linear Pace state, when its explanation is inspected, then formula version, elapsed and total days, exact plan and actual inputs, exact comparison result, and uniform-distribution limitation are returned.

Given an unavailable, insufficient, not-started, or deferred state, when its explanation is inspected, then the typed reason, evaluated evidence, unmet rule, and permitted next action are returned without an invented result.
Given a retained Report Snapshot identity, when Get or Explain is requested, then the exact immutable stored explanation and provenance are returned rather than recomputing current evidence.
Given an unknown retained identity, when Get or Explain is requested, then Not Found is returned without leaking other report metadata.
Given a deleted retained identity with a Deletion Event, when Get or Explain is requested, then Deleted is returned with metadata-only deletion evidence and no prior report payload.

Given explanatory text, when it is compared across identical structured states and policy versions, then it is semantically identical, template-based, channel-neutral, and contains no persuasion, recommendation, translation, or delivery wording.
security_criteria: Explanation returns only the selected report evidence and never expands into uncited raw merchant descriptions or unrelated transactions.
